title: bbGPT system manifest
description: Handoff snapshot for external systems. Canonical values live in TypeScript sources listed under source_of_truth.

environment_variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environment_variables.required_for: Fallback when Z.AI client cannot be constructed

environment_variables.name: BBGPT_APP_PASSWORD
environment_variables.required_for: Optional deploy gate: shared password → JWT session at /login (legacy: BABYGPT_APP_PASSWORD)

environment_variables.name: BBGPT_SESSION_SECRET
environment_variables.required_for: Required when BBGPT_APP_PASSWORD is set (signs bbgpt_token cookie; legacy BABYGPT_SESSION_SECRET / babygpt_token)

environment_variables.name: BBGPT_API_SECRET
environment_variables.required_for: Optional Bearer token for scripts calling APIs without a browser cookie (legacy: BABYGPT_API_SECRET)

environment_variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
environment_variables.required_for: Stripe Checkout/Portal success and return URLs (no trailing slash)

environment_variables.name: STRIPE_PRICE_STARTER
environment_variables.required_for: Stripe Price ID for Starter subscription

environment_variables.name: STRIPE_PRICE_PRO
environment_variables.required_for: Stripe Price ID for Pro subscription

environment_variables.name: STRIPE_PRICE_TEAM
environment_variables.required_for: Stripe Price ID for Team subscription

environment_variables.name: STRIPE_PRICE_STARTER_YEARLY
environment_variables.required_for: Optional — Stripe yearly Price ID for Starter (annual Checkout)

environment_variables.name: STRIPE_PRICE_PRO_YEARLY
environment_variables.required_for: Optional — Stripe yearly Price ID for Pro

environment_variables.name: STRIPE_PRICE_TEAM_YEARLY
environment_variables.required_for: Optional — Stripe yearly Price ID for Team

environment_variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAN_PRICE_STARTER_YEARLY_USD
environment_variables.required_for: Optional — annual list price shown in Plans modal

environment_variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAN_PRICE_PRO_YEARLY_USD
environment_variables.required_for: Optional — annual list price for Pro

environment_variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_PLAN_PRICE_TEAM_YEARLY_USD
environment_variables.required_for: Optional — annual list price for Team

api_routes.note: Server wallet + Stripe flags when gate on

localStorage.note: Legacy babygpt_* keys migrate once on load (see src/lib/storage.ts). Additional bbgpt_* keys for memory, skills, reminders, etc.

server_persistence.note: Ephemeral disk on many serverless hosts; use durable storage for multi-instance production.

production_risks: Without BBGPT_APP_PASSWORD (legacy BABYGPT_APP_PASSWORD), chat and community APIs accept unauthenticated requests; credits are client-side only.
With gate on, server wallet + plan enforcement apply per request (see chat-route-guard); still single shared wallet per deploy, not per-user accounts.
Stripe maps Price IDs to planId via env; webhook must be registered on the production URL.
Filesystem wallet/billing under .data/ is not suitable for horizontally scaled serverless without a shared volume or database.
